_categoryDeprecated: category will be removed in v1.x+2; consume taxonomy.{group,task} instead
description: Chinese text-to-speech with full NPU inference on Snapdragon X Elite, mixed-precision (w8a16), ~5.5× realtime. / 基于 Snapdragon X Elite 全 NPU 推理的中文文本转语音，混合精度量化，约 5.5 倍实时率。
longDescription: MeloTTS Chinese (myshell-ai/MeloTTS) ported to Snapdragon X Elite QNN HTP v73 backend with full NPU inference — no CPU vocoder fallback. Five NPU context binaries: bert_wrapper (BERT text encoder, float), encoder (VITS encoder, float), flow/flow_short (flow matching, w8a16), decoder (HiFi-GAN vocoder, w8a16, T=128). Dual flow-path optimization: flow_short.bin handles short sentences (phone_len ≤ 256) for ~284ms latency; flow.bin handles longer sentences at ~1018ms. Single speaker (ZH female, speaker_id=1), variable speed (0.5×–2.0×), 44100 Hz mono 16-bit PCM WAV output. Chinese text frontend with jieba segmentation, pypinyin tone, cn2an number conversion, and g2p_en for mixed English tokens. Max 500 characters input. Platform: QAIRT 2.45, HTP v73. Dependencies: numpy, jieba, pypinyin, cn2an, g2p_en, qai_appbuilder.

constraints.placeholder: 输入要合成的中文文本（支持中英混合）

audio_path.description: Repo-relative path to the synthesized WAV under data/outputs/, e.g. 'data/outputs/<runId>.wav'. Mono PCM-16 at 44100 Hz.

duration_s.description: Length of the synthesized audio in seconds (float). Equals waveform length / 44100.

sample_rate.description: Output sample rate in Hz. Always 44100.

inputs.text: 床前明月光，疑是地上霜。举头望明月，低头思故乡。
今天 8 点 30 分有 3 个 meeting，请准时参加。

sendToChatPrompt.en: This is the Mandarin-Chinese speech synthesized by the [MeloTTS] model (full NPU inference). Please evaluate and analyze the synthesis quality.
sendToChatPrompt.zh-CN: 这是通过 [MeloTTS] 模型（全 NPU 推理）合成的中文语音结果，请对合成效果进行评价和分析。
sendToChatPrompt.zh-TW: 這是通過 [MeloTTS] 模型（全 NPU 推理）合成的中文語音結果，請對合成效果進行評價與分析。
